case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSEPH M JIMENEZ DE LEON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE LEON, JOSEPH M JIMENEZ $1,338.70 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,418.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVADO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSEPH M. JIMENEZ DE LEON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED NOV-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE LEON, JOSEPH M JIMENEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - JUDGMENT.
